summary: Tests cover core cartesian product generation, include/exclude rules, and error cases with good workflow validation (actionlint, YAML structure). Well-organized unit and integration test suites. Weaknesses: edge cases insufficiently tested (include/exclude interactions, multi-axis combinations, null/duplicate values); fixtures referenced but content not shown (hardcoded expectations); only 2 of 3 allowed act runs utilized; fragile regex parsing for output extraction. Would catch obvious regressions in happy path but may miss subtle bugs in complex scenarios and CLI error handling.
